Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that works best for your business. All plans include a 3-day free trial.

Basic

For small businesses

$29/mo

$290/year

  • Business page with full details
  • Up to 10 products/services
  • 5 images per product
  • 1 video per product
  • Photo gallery
  • Contact information
  • Map integration
  • Customer reviews
Most Popular

Pro

For growing businesses

$59/mo

$590/year

  • Everything in Basic
  • Up to 30 products/services
  • 5 images per product
  • 1 video per product
  • Priority support
Best Value

Max

For large businesses

$89/mo

$890/year

  • Everything in Pro
  • Up to 60 products/services
  • 5 images per product
  • 1 video per product
  • Dedicated support

Prefer annual billing? Save with yearly plans!

Basic Yearly ($390) Pro Yearly ($690) Max Yearly ($990)
